<title>DILI Discovery Proteomics with Hotgenes</title>

<script>// Pandoc 2.9 adds attributes on both header and div. We remove the former (to
// be compatible with the behavior of Pandoc < 2.8).
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(e) {
  var hs = document.querySelectorAll("div.section[class*='level'] > :first-child");
  var i, h, a;
  for (i = 0; i < hs.length; i++) {
    h = hs[i];
    if (!/^h[1-6]$/i.test(h.tagName)) continue;  // it should be a header h1-h6
    a = h.attributes;
    while (a.length > 0) h.removeAttribute(a[0].name);
  }
});
</script>

}

}
</style>
<style type="text/css" data-origin="pandoc">
html { -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%; }
pre > code.sourceCode { white-space: pre; position: relative; }
pre > code.sourceCode > span { display: inline-block; line-height: 1.25; }
pre > code.sourceCode > span:empty { height: 1.2em; }
.sourceCode { overflow: visible; }
code.sourceCode > span { color: inherit; text-decoration: inherit; }
div.sourceCode { margin: 1em 0; }
pre.sourceCode { margin: 0; }

div.sourceCode { overflow: auto; }
}

pre > code.sourceCode { white-space: pre-wrap; }

}

{ counter-reset: source-line 0; }

{ position: relative; left: -4em; counter-increment: source-line; }
pre.numberSource code > span > a:first-child::before
{ content: counter(source-line);
position: relative; left: -1em; text-align: right; vertical-align: baseline;
border: none; display: inline-block;
-webkit-touch-callout: none; -webkit-user-select: none;
-khtml-user-select: none; -moz-user-select: none;
-ms-user-select: none; user-select: none;
padding: 0 4px; width: 4em;
color: #aaaaaa;
}
pre.numberSource { margin-left: 3em; border-left: 1px solid #aaaaaa; padding-left: 4px; }
div.sourceCode
{ }
@media screen {
pre > code.sourceCode > span > a:first-child::before { text-decoration: underline; }
}
code span.al { color: #ff0000; font-weight: bold; } 
code span.an { color: #60a0b0; font-weight: bold; font-style: italic; } 
code span.at { color: #7d9029; } 
code span.bn { color: #40a070; } 
code span.bu { color: #008000; } 
code span.cf { color: #007020; font-weight: bold; } 
code span.ch { color: #4070a0; } 
code span.cn { color: #880000; } 
code span.co { color: #60a0b0; font-style: italic; } 
code span.cv { color: #60a0b0; font-weight: bold; font-style: italic; } 
code span.do { color: #ba2121; font-style: italic; } 
code span.dt { color: #902000; } 
code span.dv { color: #40a070; } 
code span.er { color: #ff0000; font-weight: bold; } 
code span.ex { } 
code span.fl { color: #40a070; } 
code span.fu { color: #06287e; } 
code span.im { color: #008000; font-weight: bold; } 
code span.in { color: #60a0b0; font-weight: bold; font-style: italic; } 
code span.kw { color: #007020; font-weight: bold; } 
code span.op { color: #666666; } 
code span.ot { color: #007020; } 
code span.pp { color: #bc7a00; } 
code span.sc { color: #4070a0; } 
code span.ss { color: #bb6688; } 
code span.st { color: #4070a0; } 
code span.va { color: #19177c; } 
code span.vs { color: #4070a0; } 
code span.wa { color: #60a0b0; font-weight: bold; font-style: italic; } 
</style>
<script>
// apply pandoc div.sourceCode style to pre.sourceCode instead
(function() {
  var sheets = document.styleSheets;
  for (var i = 0; i < sheets.length; i++) {
    if (sheets[i].ownerNode.dataset["origin"] !== "pandoc") continue;
    try { var rules = sheets[i].cssRules; } catch (e) { continue; }
    var j = 0;
    while (j < rules.length) {
      var rule = rules[j];
      // check if there is a div.sourceCode rule
      if (rule.type !== rule.STYLE_RULE || rule.selectorText !== "div.sourceCode") {
        j++;
        continue;
      }
      var style = rule.style.cssText;
      // check if color or background-color is set
      if (rule.style.color === '' && rule.style.backgroundColor === '') {
        j++;
        continue;
      }
      // replace div.sourceCode by a pre.sourceCode rule
      sheets[i].deleteRule(j);
      sheets[i].insertRule('pre.sourceCode{' + style + '}', j);
    }
  }
})();
</script>

code > span.fl { color: #d14; } 
code > span.ch { color: #d14; } 
code > span.st { color: #d14; } 
code > span.co { color: #888888; font-style: italic; } 
code > span.ot { color: #007020; } 
code > span.al { color: #ff0000; font-weight: bold; }

<body>




<h1 class="title toc-ignore">DILI Discovery Proteomics with
Hotgenes</h1>



<div id="building-a-hotgenes-object-from-dili-discovery-proteomics-data" class="section level2">
<h2>Building a Hotgenes Object from DILI Discovery Proteomics Data</h2>
<p>This vignette demonstrates how to build a Hotgenes object from the
Drug-Induced Liver Injury (DILI) discovery proteomics dataset published
in:</p>
<blockquote>
<p>Federspiel et al. (2023). <em>Proteomics of drug-induced liver injury
(DILI) identifies a distinct bile acid signature in patients with Hy’s
Law.</em> <strong>Journal of Hepatology</strong>, 79(2), 370–382. <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jhep.2023.03.013" class="uri">https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jhep.2023.03.013</a></p>
</blockquote>
<p>The raw data are publicly deposited in MassIVE under accession
<strong>MSV000089782</strong>. A pre-parsed snapshot is shipped with
this package as <code>inst/extdata/dili_raw.RDS</code> to avoid a
runtime download.</p>
<div id="a-note-on-private-metadata" class="section level3">
<h3>A note on private metadata</h3>
<p>The original analysis used two variables from the private metadata
file <code>1219_p1-p5_protein_KEY.xlsx</code> that are
<strong>not</strong> available in the public deposit:</p>
<ol style="list-style-type: decimal">
<li><p><strong>subject</strong> – patient identifier, used with
<code>duplicateCorrelation()</code> to control for repeated measures
(paired DO/DF samples from the same patient). Without subject IDs this
blocking step is omitted here.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>channel</strong> – exact TMT channel label
(e.g. <code>126C</code>, <code>127N</code>) within each pool, used with
<code>voomaByGroup()</code> to compensate for channel-specific variance.
<code>Pool</code> (P1–P5) is used as a proxy because it captures the
dominant source of TMT batch variance.</p></li>
</ol>
<p>All other analytical steps — VSN normalization,
<code>voomaByGroup</code>, robust <code>lmFit</code>, and a BH-adjusted
p-value threshold of 0.1 — reproduce those described in Federspiel et
al.</p>
</div>
</div>
<div id="step-1-load-data" class="section level2">
<h2>Step 1 — Load data</h2>
<p><code>dili_raw.RDS</code> is a pre-parsed snapshot of the public
MassIVE deposit (MSV000089782), saved to <code>inst/extdata</code> to
avoid a runtime download.</p>
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1"><pre class="sourceCode r"><code class="sourceCode r"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">library</span>(Hotgenes)</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" tabindex="-1"></a>raw_df <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> <span class="fu">readRDS</span>(</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">system.file</span>(<span class="st">&quot;extdata&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;dili_raw.RDS&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" tabindex="-1"></a>              <span class="at">package =</span> <span class="st">&quot;Hotgenes&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" tabindex="-1"></a>              <span class="at">mustWork =</span> <span class="cn">TRUE</span>)</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" tabindex="-1"></a>)</span></code></pre></div>
<p>To re-download and refresh <code>dili_raw.RDS</code> directly from
MassIVE, run the following block once (set <code>eval = FALSE</code> to
skip during package build):</p>
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb2"><pre class="sourceCode r"><code class="sourceCode r"><span id="cb2-1"><a href="#cb2-1" tabindex="-1"></a>url <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> <span class="fu">paste0</span>(</span>
<span id="cb2-2"><a href="#cb2-2" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="st">&quot;https://massive.ucsd.edu/ProteoSAFe/DownloadResultFile?&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb2-3"><a href="#cb2-3" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="st">&quot;file=f.MSV000089782%2Fupdates%2F2023-02-28_jfederspiel_1bc96582&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb2-4"><a href="#cb2-4" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="st">&quot;%2Fother%2FDILI_discovery_data.xlsx&amp;forceDownload=true&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb2-5"><a href="#cb2-5" tabindex="-1"></a>)</span>
<span id="cb2-6"><a href="#cb2-6" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb2-7"><a href="#cb2-7" tabindex="-1"></a>tmp <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> <span class="fu">tempfile</span>(<span class="at">fileext =</span> <span class="st">&quot;.xlsx&quot;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb2-8"><a href="#cb2-8" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">download.file</span>(url, tmp, <span class="at">mode =</span> <span class="st">&quot;wb&quot;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb2-9"><a href="#cb2-9" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb2-10"><a href="#cb2-10" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># Requires readxl and janitor packages (install if needed):</span></span>
<span id="cb2-11"><a href="#cb2-11" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># install.packages(c(&quot;readxl&quot;, &quot;janitor&quot;))</span></span>
<span id="cb2-12"><a href="#cb2-12" tabindex="-1"></a>raw_df <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> readxl<span class="sc">::</span><span class="fu">read_excel</span>(tmp) <span class="sc">|&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb2-13"><a href="#cb2-13" tabindex="-1"></a>  janitor<span class="sc">::</span><span class="fu">clean_names</span>()</span>
<span id="cb2-14"><a href="#cb2-14" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb2-15"><a href="#cb2-15" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">saveRDS</span>(</span>
<span id="cb2-16"><a href="#cb2-16" tabindex="-1"></a>  raw_df,</span>
<span id="cb2-17"><a href="#cb2-17" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">file =</span> <span class="fu">file.path</span>(<span class="fu">getwd</span>(), <span class="st">&quot;inst&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;extdata&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;dili_raw.RDS&quot;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb2-18"><a href="#cb2-18" tabindex="-1"></a>)</span></code></pre></div>
</div>
<div id="step-2-identify-sample-columns" class="section level2">
<h2>Step 2 — Identify sample columns</h2>
<p>Sample columns follow the pattern
<code>&lt;condition&gt;_p&lt;pool&gt;_&lt;number&gt;</code> where
condition is one of <code>do</code>, <code>df</code>, <code>hv</code>,
<code>nafld</code>, <code>ndo</code>, or <code>ndf</code>.</p>
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb3"><pre class="sourceCode r"><code class="sourceCode r"><span id="cb3-1"><a href="#cb3-1" tabindex="-1"></a>sample_cols <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> <span class="fu">colnames</span>(raw_df)[</span>
<span id="cb3-2"><a href="#cb3-2" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">grepl</span>(<span class="st">&quot;^(do|df|hv|nafld|ndo|ndf)_&quot;</span>, <span class="fu">colnames</span>(raw_df))</span>
<span id="cb3-3"><a href="#cb3-3" tabindex="-1"></a>]</span>
<span id="cb3-4"><a href="#cb3-4" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb3-5"><a href="#cb3-5" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">length</span>(sample_cols)</span>
<span id="cb3-6"><a href="#cb3-6" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## [1] 50</span></span>
<span id="cb3-7"><a href="#cb3-7" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">head</span>(sample_cols)</span>
<span id="cb3-8"><a href="#cb3-8" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## [1] &quot;do_p1_1&quot;  &quot;do_p1_2&quot;  &quot;do_p2_19&quot; &quot;do_p2_20&quot; &quot;do_p3_24&quot; &quot;do_p3_27&quot;</span></span></code></pre></div>
</div>
<div id="step-3-filter-proteins" class="section level2">
<h2>Step 3 — Filter proteins</h2>
<p>Retain only:</p>
<ul>
<li>Reviewed UniProt entries (accession starts with
<code>sp|</code>)</li>
<li>Proteins that are not contaminants</li>
<li>Proteins quantified with at least one peptide
(<code>min_peps &gt; 0</code>)</li>
</ul>
<p>Unique gene symbols are generated as the <code>Feature</code> column,
which is required downstream for GSEA.</p>
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb4"><pre class="sourceCode r"><code class="sourceCode r"><span id="cb4-1"><a href="#cb4-1" tabindex="-1"></a>filtered_exps <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> raw_df <span class="sc">|&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb4-2"><a href="#cb4-2" tabindex="-1"></a>  dplyr<span class="sc">::</span><span class="fu">filter</span>(<span class="sc">!</span><span class="fu">grepl</span>(<span class="st">&quot;contaminant&quot;</span>, .data<span class="sc">$</span>protein)) <span class="sc">|&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb4-3"><a href="#cb4-3" tabindex="-1"></a>  dplyr<span class="sc">::</span><span class="fu">filter</span>(<span class="fu">grepl</span>(<span class="st">&quot;^sp[|]&quot;</span>, .data<span class="sc">$</span>protein)) <span class="sc">|&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb4-4"><a href="#cb4-4" tabindex="-1"></a>  dplyr<span class="sc">::</span><span class="fu">filter</span>(.data<span class="sc">$</span>min_peps <span class="sc">&gt;</span> <span class="dv">0</span>) <span class="sc">|&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb4-5"><a href="#cb4-5" tabindex="-1"></a>  dplyr<span class="sc">::</span><span class="fu">mutate</span>(<span class="at">Feature =</span> <span class="fu">make.names</span>(.data<span class="sc">$</span>gene_symbol, <span class="at">unique =</span> <span class="cn">TRUE</span>))</span>
<span id="cb4-6"><a href="#cb4-6" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb4-7"><a href="#cb4-7" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">nrow</span>(filtered_exps)</span>
<span id="cb4-8"><a href="#cb4-8" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## [1] 1463</span></span></code></pre></div>
</div>
<div id="step-4-build-the-expression-matrix" class="section level2">
<h2>Step 4 — Build the expression matrix</h2>
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb5"><pre class="sourceCode r"><code class="sourceCode r"><span id="cb5-1"><a href="#cb5-1" tabindex="-1"></a>expr_matrix <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> filtered_exps <span class="sc">|&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb5-2"><a href="#cb5-2" tabindex="-1"></a>  dplyr<span class="sc">::</span><span class="fu">select</span>(<span class="st">&quot;Feature&quot;</span>, dplyr<span class="sc">::</span><span class="fu">any_of</span>(sample_cols)) <span class="sc">|&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb5-3"><a href="#cb5-3" tabindex="-1"></a>  tibble<span class="sc">::</span><span class="fu">column_to_rownames</span>(<span class="st">&quot;Feature&quot;</span>) <span class="sc">|&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb5-4"><a href="#cb5-4" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">as.matrix</span>()</span>
<span id="cb5-5"><a href="#cb5-5" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb5-6"><a href="#cb5-6" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">dim</span>(expr_matrix)</span>
<span id="cb5-7"><a href="#cb5-7" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## [1] 1463   50</span></span></code></pre></div>
</div>
<div id="step-5-build-the-protein-id-mapper" class="section level2">
<h2>Step 5 — Build the protein ID mapper</h2>
<p>The mapper links <code>Feature</code> names back to the original gene
symbol, full protein accession, and description. Hotgenes functions use
the mapper to display human-readable labels in plots and tables.</p>
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb6"><pre class="sourceCode r"><code class="sourceCode r"><span id="cb6-1"><a href="#cb6-1" tabindex="-1"></a>mapper_df <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> filtered_exps <span class="sc">|&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb6-2"><a href="#cb6-2" tabindex="-1"></a>  dplyr<span class="sc">::</span><span class="fu">select</span>(</span>
<span id="cb6-3"><a href="#cb6-3" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="st">&quot;Feature&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb6-4"><a href="#cb6-4" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="st">&quot;Gene&quot;</span>        <span class="ot">=</span> <span class="st">&quot;gene_symbol&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb6-5"><a href="#cb6-5" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="st">&quot;Protein&quot;</span>     <span class="ot">=</span> <span class="st">&quot;protein&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb6-6"><a href="#cb6-6" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="st">&quot;Description&quot;</span> <span class="ot">=</span> <span class="st">&quot;description&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb6-7"><a href="#cb6-7" tabindex="-1"></a>  )</span>
<span id="cb6-8"><a href="#cb6-8" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb6-9"><a href="#cb6-9" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">head</span>(mapper_df)</span>
<span id="cb6-10"><a href="#cb6-10" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## # A tibble: 6 × 4</span></span>
<span id="cb6-11"><a href="#cb6-11" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">##   Feature  Gene     Protein                   Description                                                   </span></span>
<span id="cb6-12"><a href="#cb6-12" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">##   &lt;chr&gt;    &lt;chr&gt;    &lt;chr&gt;                     &lt;chr&gt;                                                         </span></span>
<span id="cb6-13"><a href="#cb6-13" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## 1 IGLV4.69 IGLV4-69 sp|A0A075B6H9|LV469_HUMAN Immunoglobulin lambda variable 4-69 OS=Homo sapiens GN=IGLV4-…</span></span>
<span id="cb6-14"><a href="#cb6-14" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## 2 IGLV4.60 IGLV4-60 sp|A0A075B6I1|LV460_HUMAN Immunoglobulin lambda variable 4-60 OS=Homo sapiens GN=IGLV4-…</span></span>
<span id="cb6-15"><a href="#cb6-15" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## 3 IGLV3.16 IGLV3-16 sp|A0A075B6K0|LV316_HUMAN Immunoglobulin lambda variable 3-16 OS=Homo sapiens GN=IGLV3-…</span></span>
<span id="cb6-16"><a href="#cb6-16" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## 4 IGLV3.10 IGLV3-10 sp|A0A075B6K4|LV310_HUMAN Immunoglobulin lambda variable 3-10 OS=Homo sapiens GN=IGLV3-…</span></span>
<span id="cb6-17"><a href="#cb6-17" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## 5 IGLV3.9  IGLV3-9  sp|A0A075B6K5|LV39_HUMAN  Immunoglobulin lambda variable 3-9 OS=Homo sapiens GN=IGLV3-9…</span></span>
<span id="cb6-18"><a href="#cb6-18" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## # ℹ 1 more row</span></span></code></pre></div>
</div>
<div id="step-6-build-sample-metadata-coldata" class="section level2">
<h2>Step 6 — Build sample metadata (coldata)</h2>
<p>Condition and pool are parsed from the sample column names.<br />
<code>Condition</code> levels are ordered so that healthy volunteers
(<code>HV</code>) appear first.</p>
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb7"><pre class="sourceCode r"><code class="sourceCode r"><span id="cb7-1"><a href="#cb7-1" tabindex="-1"></a>coldata <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> <span class="fu">data.frame</span>(</span>
<span id="cb7-2"><a href="#cb7-2" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">Sample    =</span> sample_cols,</span>
<span id="cb7-3"><a href="#cb7-3" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">Condition =</span> <span class="fu">toupper</span>(<span class="fu">sub</span>(<span class="st">&quot;_p[0-9]+_[0-9]+$&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;&quot;</span>, sample_cols)),</span>
<span id="cb7-4"><a href="#cb7-4" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">Pool      =</span> <span class="fu">toupper</span>(<span class="fu">sub</span>(<span class="st">&quot;.*_(p[0-9]+)_.*&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;</span><span class="sc">\\</span><span class="st">1&quot;</span>, sample_cols)),</span>
<span id="cb7-5"><a href="#cb7-5" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">row.names =</span> sample_cols,</span>
<span id="cb7-6"><a href="#cb7-6" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">stringsAsFactors =</span> <span class="cn">TRUE</span></span>
<span id="cb7-7"><a href="#cb7-7" tabindex="-1"></a>)</span>
<span id="cb7-8"><a href="#cb7-8" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb7-9"><a href="#cb7-9" tabindex="-1"></a>coldata[[<span class="st">&quot;Condition&quot;</span>]] <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> <span class="fu">factor</span>(</span>
<span id="cb7-10"><a href="#cb7-10" tabindex="-1"></a>  coldata[[<span class="st">&quot;Condition&quot;</span>]],</span>
<span id="cb7-11"><a href="#cb7-11" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">levels =</span> <span class="fu">c</span>(<span class="st">&quot;HV&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;DO&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;DF&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;NDO&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;NDF&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;NAFLD&quot;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb7-12"><a href="#cb7-12" tabindex="-1"></a>)</span>
<span id="cb7-13"><a href="#cb7-13" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb7-14"><a href="#cb7-14" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">table</span>(coldata<span class="sc">$</span>Condition)</span>
<span id="cb7-15"><a href="#cb7-15" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## </span></span>
<span id="cb7-16"><a href="#cb7-16" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">##    HV    DO    DF   NDO   NDF NAFLD </span></span>
<span id="cb7-17"><a href="#cb7-17" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">##    10    10    10     5     5    10</span></span></code></pre></div>
</div>
<div id="step-7-vsn-normalization" class="section level2">
<h2>Step 7 — VSN normalization</h2>
<p>Variance-stabilising normalisation (<code>limma::normalizeVSN</code>)
is applied to correct for intensity-dependent variance across the
dynamic range of the TMT measurements. Missing values are replaced with
0 before normalisation.</p>
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb8"><pre class="sourceCode r"><code class="sourceCode r"><span id="cb8-1"><a href="#cb8-1" tabindex="-1"></a>expr_matrix[<span class="fu">is.na</span>(expr_matrix)] <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> <span class="dv">0</span></span>
<span id="cb8-2"><a href="#cb8-2" tabindex="-1"></a>expr_matrix_vsn <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> limma<span class="sc">::</span><span class="fu">normalizeVSN</span>(expr_matrix)</span>
<span id="cb8-3"><a href="#cb8-3" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## vsn2: 1463 x 50 matrix (1 stratum).</span></span>
<span id="cb8-4"><a href="#cb8-4" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## Please use &#39;meanSdPlot&#39; to verify the fit.</span></span></code></pre></div>
</div>
<div id="step-8-design-matrix" class="section level2">
<h2>Step 8 — Design matrix</h2>
<p>A no-intercept design matrix is constructed so that each coefficient
directly represents the mean VSN-normalised expression for one
condition, making contrasts straightforward to specify.</p>
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb9"><pre class="sourceCode r"><code class="sourceCode r"><span id="cb9-1"><a href="#cb9-1" tabindex="-1"></a>design <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> <span class="fu">model.matrix</span>(<span class="sc">~</span> <span class="dv">0</span> <span class="sc">+</span> Condition, <span class="at">data =</span> coldata)</span>
<span id="cb9-2"><a href="#cb9-2" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">colnames</span>(design) <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> <span class="fu">gsub</span>(<span class="st">&quot;Condition&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;&quot;</span>, <span class="fu">colnames</span>(design))</span>
<span id="cb9-3"><a href="#cb9-3" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb9-4"><a href="#cb9-4" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">head</span>(design)</span>
<span id="cb9-5"><a href="#cb9-5" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">##          HV DO DF NDO NDF NAFLD</span></span>
<span id="cb9-6"><a href="#cb9-6" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## do_p1_1   0  1  0   0   0     0</span></span>
<span id="cb9-7"><a href="#cb9-7" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## do_p1_2   0  1  0   0   0     0</span></span>
<span id="cb9-8"><a href="#cb9-8" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## do_p2_19  0  1  0   0   0     0</span></span>
<span id="cb9-9"><a href="#cb9-9" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## do_p2_20  0  1  0   0   0     0</span></span>
<span id="cb9-10"><a href="#cb9-10" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## do_p3_24  0  1  0   0   0     0</span></span>
<span id="cb9-11"><a href="#cb9-11" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## do_p3_27  0  1  0   0   0     0</span></span></code></pre></div>
</div>
<div id="step-9-voomabygroup-transformation" class="section level2">
<h2>Step 9 — voomaByGroup transformation</h2>
<p><code>limma::voomaByGroup</code> estimates mean–variance trends
separately for each TMT pool and converts the VSN-normalised intensities
into precision weights for downstream linear modelling.
<code>Pool</code> is used as the grouping variable because it captures
the dominant source of batch variance in the public deposit.</p>
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb10"><pre class="sourceCode r"><code class="sourceCode r"><span id="cb10-1"><a href="#cb10-1" tabindex="-1"></a>vm_exp <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> limma<span class="sc">::</span><span class="fu">voomaByGroup</span>(</span>
<span id="cb10-2"><a href="#cb10-2" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">y      =</span> expr_matrix_vsn,</span>
<span id="cb10-3"><a href="#cb10-3" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">group  =</span> coldata[[<span class="st">&quot;Pool&quot;</span>]],</span>
<span id="cb10-4"><a href="#cb10-4" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">design =</span> design,</span>
<span id="cb10-5"><a href="#cb10-5" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">plot   =</span> <span class="cn">FALSE</span></span>
<span id="cb10-6"><a href="#cb10-6" tabindex="-1"></a>)</span></code></pre></div>
</div>
<div id="step-10-robust-linear-model-fit" class="section level2">
<h2>Step 10 — Robust linear model fit</h2>
<p><code>limma::lmFit</code> with <code>method = &quot;robust&quot;</code>
downweights outlier samples when estimating per-protein coefficients,
improving robustness against occasional poorly quantified channels.</p>
<p>Note: <code>duplicateCorrelation()</code> is omitted here because the
patient subject IDs required to model repeated measures (paired DO/DF
samples) are not available in the public deposit.</p>
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb11"><pre class="sourceCode r"><code class="sourceCode r"><span id="cb11-1"><a href="#cb11-1" tabindex="-1"></a>fit <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> limma<span class="sc">::</span><span class="fu">lmFit</span>(</span>
<span id="cb11-2"><a href="#cb11-2" tabindex="-1"></a>  vm_exp,</span>
<span id="cb11-3"><a href="#cb11-3" tabindex="-1"></a>  design,</span>
<span id="cb11-4"><a href="#cb11-4" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">method =</span> <span class="st">&quot;robust&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb11-5"><a href="#cb11-5" tabindex="-1"></a>)</span>
<span id="cb11-6"><a href="#cb11-6" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## Warning in rlm.default(x = X, y = y, weights = w, ...): &#39;rlm&#39; failed to converge in 20 steps</span></span>
<span id="cb11-7"><a href="#cb11-7" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## Warning in rlm.default(x = X, y = y, weights = w, ...): &#39;rlm&#39; failed to converge in 20 steps</span></span>
<span id="cb11-8"><a href="#cb11-8" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## Warning in rlm.default(x = X, y = y, weights = w, ...): &#39;rlm&#39; failed to converge in 20 steps</span></span>
<span id="cb11-9"><a href="#cb11-9" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## Warning in rlm.default(x = X, y = y, weights = w, ...): &#39;rlm&#39; failed to converge in 20 steps</span></span>
<span id="cb11-10"><a href="#cb11-10" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## Warning in rlm.default(x = X, y = y, weights = w, ...): &#39;rlm&#39; failed to converge in 20 steps</span></span>
<span id="cb11-11"><a href="#cb11-11" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## Warning in rlm.default(x = X, y = y, weights = w, ...): &#39;rlm&#39; failed to converge in 20 steps</span></span>
<span id="cb11-12"><a href="#cb11-12" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## Warning in rlm.default(x = X, y = y, weights = w, ...): &#39;rlm&#39; failed to converge in 20 steps</span></span>
<span id="cb11-13"><a href="#cb11-13" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## Warning in rlm.default(x = X, y = y, weights = w, ...): &#39;rlm&#39; failed to converge in 20 steps</span></span>
<span id="cb11-14"><a href="#cb11-14" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## Warning in rlm.default(x = X, y = y, weights = w, ...): &#39;rlm&#39; failed to converge in 20 steps</span></span>
<span id="cb11-15"><a href="#cb11-15" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## Warning in rlm.default(x = X, y = y, weights = w, ...): &#39;rlm&#39; failed to converge in 20 steps</span></span>
<span id="cb11-16"><a href="#cb11-16" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## Warning in rlm.default(x = X, y = y, weights = w, ...): &#39;rlm&#39; failed to converge in 20 steps</span></span>
<span id="cb11-17"><a href="#cb11-17" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## Warning in rlm.default(x = X, y = y, weights = w, ...): &#39;rlm&#39; failed to converge in 20 steps</span></span>
<span id="cb11-18"><a href="#cb11-18" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## Warning in rlm.default(x = X, y = y, weights = w, ...): &#39;rlm&#39; failed to converge in 20 steps</span></span>
<span id="cb11-19"><a href="#cb11-19" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## Warning in rlm.default(x = X, y = y, weights = w, ...): &#39;rlm&#39; failed to converge in 20 steps</span></span></code></pre></div>
</div>
<div id="step-11-define-contrasts-and-run-ebayes" class="section level2">
<h2>Step 11 — Define contrasts and run eBayes</h2>
<p>Seven clinically motivated contrasts are tested, all relative to
healthy volunteers (<code>HV</code>), plus one intra-DILI comparison
(<code>DF_vs_DO</code>) and one cross-group comparison
(<code>NDO_vs_DO</code>).</p>
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb12"><pre class="sourceCode r"><code class="sourceCode r"><span id="cb12-1"><a href="#cb12-1" tabindex="-1"></a>contrasts_mat <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> limma<span class="sc">::</span><span class="fu">makeContrasts</span>(</span>
<span id="cb12-2"><a href="#cb12-2" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">DO_vs_HV    =</span> DO    <span class="sc">-</span> HV,</span>
<span id="cb12-3"><a href="#cb12-3" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">DF_vs_HV    =</span> DF    <span class="sc">-</span> HV,</span>
<span id="cb12-4"><a href="#cb12-4" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">NDO_vs_HV   =</span> NDO   <span class="sc">-</span> HV,</span>
<span id="cb12-5"><a href="#cb12-5" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">NDF_vs_HV   =</span> NDF   <span class="sc">-</span> HV,</span>
<span id="cb12-6"><a href="#cb12-6" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">NAFLD_vs_HV =</span> NAFLD <span class="sc">-</span> HV,</span>
<span id="cb12-7"><a href="#cb12-7" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">DF_vs_DO    =</span> DF    <span class="sc">-</span> DO,</span>
<span id="cb12-8"><a href="#cb12-8" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">NDO_vs_DO   =</span> NDO   <span class="sc">-</span> DO,</span>
<span id="cb12-9"><a href="#cb12-9" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">levels =</span> design</span>
<span id="cb12-10"><a href="#cb12-10" tabindex="-1"></a>)</span>
<span id="cb12-11"><a href="#cb12-11" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb12-12"><a href="#cb12-12" tabindex="-1"></a>fit2 <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> limma<span class="sc">::</span><span class="fu">contrasts.fit</span>(fit, contrasts_mat)</span>
<span id="cb12-13"><a href="#cb12-13" tabindex="-1"></a>fit2 <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> limma<span class="sc">::</span><span class="fu">eBayes</span>(fit2)</span></code></pre></div>
</div>
<div id="step-12-create-the-hotgenes-object" class="section level2">
<h2>Step 12 — Create the Hotgenes object</h2>
<p>All upstream objects are bundled into a single <code>Hotgenes</code>
object using <code>Hotgeneslimma()</code>. The raw log2-transformed
matrix is stored as an auxiliary assay so it is available for
alternative visualisations.</p>
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb13"><pre class="sourceCode r"><code class="sourceCode r"><span id="cb13-1"><a href="#cb13-1" tabindex="-1"></a>dili_hotgenes <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> <span class="fu">Hotgeneslimma</span>(</span>
<span id="cb13-2"><a href="#cb13-2" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">limmafit        =</span> fit2,</span>
<span id="cb13-3"><a href="#cb13-3" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">coldata         =</span> coldata,</span>
<span id="cb13-4"><a href="#cb13-4" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">Expression      =</span> vm_exp,</span>
<span id="cb13-5"><a href="#cb13-5" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">Expression_name =</span> <span class="st">&quot;VSN&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb13-6"><a href="#cb13-6" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">Exps_list       =</span> <span class="fu">list</span>(<span class="at">log2 =</span> <span class="fu">log2</span>(expr_matrix <span class="sc">+</span> <span class="dv">1</span>)),</span>
<span id="cb13-7"><a href="#cb13-7" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">Mapper          =</span> mapper_df</span>
<span id="cb13-8"><a href="#cb13-8" tabindex="-1"></a>)</span>
<span id="cb13-9"><a href="#cb13-9" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb13-10"><a href="#cb13-10" tabindex="-1"></a>dili_hotgenes</span>
<span id="cb13-11"><a href="#cb13-11" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## class: Hotgenes </span></span>
<span id="cb13-12"><a href="#cb13-12" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## Original class/package:  EList/limma</span></span>
<span id="cb13-13"><a href="#cb13-13" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## </span></span>
<span id="cb13-14"><a href="#cb13-14" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## Differential expression (default thresholds): </span></span>
<span id="cb13-15"><a href="#cb13-15" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## |contrast    | total|</span></span>
<span id="cb13-16"><a href="#cb13-16" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## |:-----------|-----:|</span></span>
<span id="cb13-17"><a href="#cb13-17" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## |DF_vs_DO    |    61|</span></span>
<span id="cb13-18"><a href="#cb13-18" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## |DF_vs_HV    |    73|</span></span>
<span id="cb13-19"><a href="#cb13-19" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## |DO_vs_HV    |   212|</span></span>
<span id="cb13-20"><a href="#cb13-20" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## |NAFLD_vs_HV |   428|</span></span>
<span id="cb13-21"><a href="#cb13-21" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## |NDF_vs_HV   |    78|</span></span>
<span id="cb13-22"><a href="#cb13-22" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## |NDO_vs_DO   |    73|</span></span>
<span id="cb13-23"><a href="#cb13-23" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## |NDO_vs_HV   |   303|</span></span>
<span id="cb13-24"><a href="#cb13-24" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## </span></span>
<span id="cb13-25"><a href="#cb13-25" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## Available feature mapping:  Feature, Gene, Protein, Description </span></span>
<span id="cb13-26"><a href="#cb13-26" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## ExpressionSlots:  VSN, log2 </span></span>
<span id="cb13-27"><a href="#cb13-27" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## Total auxiliary assays:  0 </span></span>
<span id="cb13-28"><a href="#cb13-28" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## Total samples:  50</span></span></code></pre></div>
</div>
<div id="what-can-you-do-with-the-dili-hotgenes-object" class="section level2">
<h2>What can you do with the DILI Hotgenes object?</h2>
<div id="summary-of-differentially-expressed-proteins" class="section level3">
<h3>Summary of differentially expressed proteins</h3>
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb14"><pre class="sourceCode r"><code class="sourceCode r"><span id="cb14-1"><a href="#cb14-1" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">DE</span>(dili_hotgenes, <span class="at">Topn =</span> <span class="dv">5</span>)</span>
<span id="cb14-2"><a href="#cb14-2" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## $DF_vs_DO</span></span>
<span id="cb14-3"><a href="#cb14-3" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## # A tibble: 5 × 14</span></span>
<span id="cb14-4"><a href="#cb14-4" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">##   Feature contrast_dir  baseMean log2FoldChange     FC  stat   pvalue        padj     t     B Gene   Protein</span></span>
<span id="cb14-5"><a href="#cb14-5" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">##   &lt;chr&gt;   &lt;chr&gt;            &lt;dbl&gt;          &lt;dbl&gt;  &lt;dbl&gt; &lt;dbl&gt;    &lt;dbl&gt;       &lt;dbl&gt; &lt;dbl&gt; &lt;dbl&gt; &lt;chr&gt;  &lt;chr&gt;  </span></span>
<span id="cb14-6"><a href="#cb14-6" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## 1 HPD     DF_vs_DO_down    -3.19          -3.51 0.0875 -8.23 8.90e-11 0.000000130 -8.23 14.3  HPD    sp|P32…</span></span>
<span id="cb14-7"><a href="#cb14-7" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## 2 GPT     DF_vs_DO_down    -2.96          -3.62 0.0814 -7.79 4.18e-10 0.000000306 -7.79 12.9  GPT    sp|P24…</span></span>
<span id="cb14-8"><a href="#cb14-8" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## 3 AMDHD1  DF_vs_DO_down    -3.32          -3.09 0.118  -7.34 2.01e- 9 0.000000979 -7.34 11.4  AMDHD1 sp|Q96…</span></span>
<span id="cb14-9"><a href="#cb14-9" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## 4 GOT1    DF_vs_DO_down    -2.51          -2.57 0.168  -6.42 5.29e- 8 0.0000193   -6.42  8.29 GOT1   sp|P17…</span></span>
<span id="cb14-10"><a href="#cb14-10" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## 5 ECI1    DF_vs_DO_down    -2.83          -3.68 0.0780 -6.27 9.21e- 8 0.0000269   -6.27  7.77 ECI1   sp|P42…</span></span>
<span id="cb14-11"><a href="#cb14-11" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## # ℹ 2 more variables: Description &lt;chr&gt;, significant &lt;chr&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb14-12"><a href="#cb14-12" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## </span></span>

</div>
<div id="overview-plot-of-all-contrasts" class="section level3">
<h3>Overview plot of all contrasts</h3>
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb15"><pre class="sourceCode r"><code class="sourceCode r"><span id="cb15-1"><a href="#cb15-1" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">DEPlot</span>(dili_hotgenes, <span class="at">.log2FoldChange =</span> <span class="dv">0</span>, <span class="at">padj_cut =</span> <span class="fl">0.1</span>)</span></code></pre></div>
<p><img role="img" src="data:image/png;base64," /><!-- --></p>
</div>
<div id="volcano-plot" class="section level3">
<h3>Volcano plot</h3>
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb16"><pre class="sourceCode r"><code class="sourceCode r"><span id="cb16-1"><a href="#cb16-1" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">VPlot</span>(dili_hotgenes,</span>
<span id="cb16-2"><a href="#cb16-2" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="at">.log2FoldChange =</span> <span class="dv">1</span>, <span class="at">padj_cut =</span> <span class="fl">0.1</span>,</span>
<span id="cb16-3"><a href="#cb16-3" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="at">contrasts =</span> <span class="st">&quot;DO_vs_HV&quot;</span>)</span></code></pre></div>
<p><img role="img" src="data:image/png;base64," /><!-- --></p>
</div>
<div id="venn-diagram-of-overlapping-hits" class="section level3">
<h3>Venn diagram of overlapping hits</h3>
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb17"><pre class="sourceCode r"><code class="sourceCode r"><span id="cb17-1"><a href="#cb17-1" tabindex="-1"></a>dili_hotgenes <span class="sc">|&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb17-2"><a href="#cb17-2" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">DE</span>(</span>
<span id="cb17-3"><a href="#cb17-3" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">Report     =</span> <span class="st">&quot;Features&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb17-4"><a href="#cb17-4" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">contrasts  =</span> <span class="fu">c</span>(<span class="st">&quot;DO_vs_HV&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;DF_vs_HV&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;NAFLD_vs_HV&quot;</span>),</span>
<span id="cb17-5"><a href="#cb17-5" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">.log2FoldChange =</span> <span class="dv">0</span>, <span class="at">padj_cut =</span> <span class="fl">0.1</span></span>
<span id="cb17-6"><a href="#cb17-6" tabindex="-1"></a>  ) <span class="sc">|&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb17-7"><a href="#cb17-7" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">Venn_Report</span>()</span>
<span id="cb17-8"><a href="#cb17-8" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## Coordinate system already present.</span></span>
<span id="cb17-9"><a href="#cb17-9" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## ℹ Adding new coordinate system, which will replace the existing one.</span></span>
<span id="cb17-10"><a href="#cb17-10" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## $vennD</span></span></code></pre></div>
<p><img role="img" src="data:image/png;base64," /><!-- --></p>
<pre><code>## 
## $Intsect
## $Intsect$DF_vs_HV
## [1] &quot;MADCAM1&quot; &quot;DMKN&quot;    &quot;ADAM22&quot;  &quot;GLA&quot;     &quot;GM2A&quot;   
## 
## $Intsect$DO_vs_HV
##  [1] &quot;GPT&quot;      &quot;CEACAM1&quot;  &quot;AMDHD1&quot;   &quot;ALPL&quot;     &quot;ECI1&quot;     &quot;NECTIN3&quot;  &quot;DDTL&quot;     &quot;ASL&quot;      &quot;ECHDC2&quot;  
## [10] &quot;ANPEP&quot;    &quot;THOP1&quot;    &quot;ADGRG6&quot;   &quot;F11R&quot;     &quot;NT5E&quot;     &quot;PCDHGC3&quot;  &quot;MAN1A1&quot;   &quot;ASS1&quot;     &quot;DCXR&quot;    
## [19] &quot;DMGDH&quot;    &quot;SLC39A14&quot; &quot;CADM1&quot;    &quot;DCBLD1&quot;   &quot;MYRF&quot;     &quot;BHMT&quot;     &quot;OTC&quot;      &quot;CCM2&quot;     &quot;FAH&quot;     
## [28] &quot;EPHA1&quot;    &quot;NECTIN2&quot;  &quot;MDH2&quot;     &quot;SMPD1&quot;    &quot;LEPR&quot;     &quot;GPLD1&quot;    &quot;OAF&quot;      &quot;ADH1A&quot;    &quot;CTSS&quot;    
## [37] &quot;CHST12&quot;   &quot;GALNT4&quot;   &quot;GRHPR&quot;    &quot;SUSD5&quot;    &quot;XPNPEP2&quot;  &quot;INSR&quot;     &quot;LAMP2&quot;    &quot;GGH&quot;      &quot;RTN4R&quot;   
## [46] &quot;HPX&quot;      &quot;PCDH1&quot;    &quot;GSTA1&quot;    &quot;PCK2&quot;     &quot;MARCO&quot;    &quot;BASP1&quot;    &quot;RTN4RL2&quot; 
## 
## $Intsect$NAFLD_vs_HV
##   [1] &quot;ADAMTSL2&quot;   &quot;CALU&quot;       &quot;PPBP&quot;       &quot;APP&quot;        &quot;FLNC&quot;       &quot;PCDH9&quot;      &quot;C7&quot;        
##   [8] &quot;ADA2&quot;       &quot;FUT11&quot;      &quot;PRCP&quot;       &quot;PTGR1&quot;      &quot;CD97&quot;       &quot;ITGA5&quot;      &quot;ARPC1B&quot;    
##  [15] &quot;ILK&quot;        &quot;NFASC&quot;      &quot;PLXNB2&quot;     &quot;EPHA7&quot;      &quot;ACTC1&quot;      &quot;PABPC1&quot;     &quot;VCAM1&quot;     
##  [22] &quot;AGRN&quot;       &quot;NRCAM&quot;      &quot;MRC2&quot;       &quot;HMCN1&quot;      &quot;ROBO1&quot;      &quot;GBE1&quot;       &quot;CNTN4&quot;     
##  [29] &quot;COL6A1&quot;     &quot;CDH6&quot;       &quot;CNTN5&quot;      &quot;CSF1R&quot;      &quot;ERVMER34.1&quot; &quot;NHLRC3&quot;     &quot;TNNC2&quot;     
##  [36] &quot;SERPINE1&quot;   &quot;NID1&quot;       &quot;MFAP4&quot;      &quot;FGL2&quot;       &quot;SEMA7A&quot;     &quot;CMPK1&quot;      &quot;TXNRD1&quot;    
##  [43] &quot;GPD1&quot;       &quot;ARPC5&quot;      &quot;ITGA4&quot;      &quot;JAG1&quot;       &quot;SEMA4B&quot;     &quot;ITGB2&quot;      &quot;STX7&quot;      
##  [50] &quot;NEO1&quot;       &quot;GP5&quot;        &quot;CES1&quot;       &quot;CD163&quot;      &quot;CLIC4&quot;      &quot;SRGN&quot;       &quot;CBLN4&quot;     
##  [57] &quot;INHBE&quot;      &quot;SDC4&quot;       &quot;XYLT2&quot;      &quot;GGT5&quot;       &quot;ACP2&quot;       &quot;LEAP2&quot;      &quot;TGFB1&quot;     
##  [64] &quot;SEMA6A&quot;     &quot;YWHAZ&quot;      &quot;ITGB1&quot;      &quot;CD109&quot;      &quot;SERPINB9&quot;   &quot;ANGPTL8&quot;    &quot;YWHAH&quot;     
##  [71] &quot;CES2&quot;       &quot;RSU1&quot;       &quot;OIT3&quot;       &quot;SPP2&quot;       &quot;COLEC11&quot;    &quot;ERP29&quot;      &quot;ICAM3&quot;     
##  [78] &quot;AXL&quot;        &quot;SEMA6D&quot;     &quot;DDR1&quot;       &quot;PLA2G15&quot;    &quot;EXT1&quot;       &quot;CDHR2&quot;      &quot;DMTN&quot;      
##  [85] &quot;QDPR&quot;       &quot;ARPC2&quot;      &quot;FDPS&quot;       &quot;CDH11&quot;      &quot;LTBP1&quot;      &quot;ECM1&quot;       &quot;HEXA&quot;      
##  [92] &quot;VIM&quot;        &quot;MSN&quot;        &quot;CAPZA1&quot;     &quot;VCL&quot;        &quot;PROZ&quot;       &quot;VGF&quot;        &quot;BCAM&quot;      
##  [99] &quot;EXT2&quot;       &quot;PPIA&quot;       &quot;TNFRSF14&quot;   &quot;DYNLL2&quot;     &quot;COLEC10&quot;    &quot;PTPRK&quot;      &quot;CPQ&quot;       
## [106] &quot;CHI3L1&quot;     &quot;NID2&quot;       &quot;AOC3&quot;       &quot;FCMR&quot;       &quot;CD33&quot;       &quot;ACTG1&quot;      &quot;CLN5&quot;      
## [113] &quot;DCBLD2&quot;     &quot;EFNB1&quot;      &quot;LY75&quot;       &quot;SFN&quot;        &quot;ARHGAP1&quot;    &quot;ANG&quot;        &quot;PTK7&quot;      
## [120] &quot;SBSN&quot;       &quot;ART4&quot;       &quot;CR1&quot;        &quot;SEMA3G&quot;     &quot;LCN2&quot;       &quot;SEMA3A&quot;     &quot;CTSA&quot;      
## [127] &quot;SPINK5&quot;     &quot;CAPZA2&quot;     &quot;ACTR2&quot;      &quot;BST1&quot;       &quot;IMPAD1&quot;     &quot;UNC5C&quot;      &quot;MEGF8&quot;     
## [134] &quot;SULF2&quot;      &quot;PAPLN&quot;      &quot;MMP3&quot;       &quot;GALNS&quot;      &quot;APOM&quot;       &quot;HNRNPC&quot;     &quot;LILRA3&quot;    
## [141] &quot;LGALS3BP&quot;   &quot;GOLM1&quot;      &quot;LNPEP&quot;      &quot;MLEC&quot;       &quot;STMN1&quot;      &quot;PF4V1&quot;      &quot;YWHAB&quot;     
## [148] &quot;CFHR5&quot;      &quot;PROC&quot;       &quot;PDGFB&quot;      &quot;PLEC&quot;       &quot;ITGA1&quot;      &quot;ACTR3&quot;      &quot;APLP1&quot;     
## [155] &quot;ROBO2&quot;      &quot;CD84&quot;       &quot;JAG2&quot;       &quot;PAK1&quot;       &quot;B3GAT3&quot;     &quot;ENDOD1&quot;     &quot;WFDC1&quot;     
## [162] &quot;WFIKKN2&quot;    &quot;GALNT6&quot;     &quot;ENPP4&quot;      &quot;ECM2&quot;       &quot;IGFBP5&quot;     &quot;SPINT1&quot;     &quot;PLXND1&quot;    
## [169] &quot;NRP1&quot;       &quot;PTPRC&quot;      &quot;BTN2A1&quot;     &quot;ME1&quot;        &quot;IGF1&quot;       &quot;OSMR&quot;       &quot;COL14A1&quot;   
## [176] &quot;LYVE1&quot;      &quot;FGFR4&quot;      &quot;TNFRSF21&quot;   &quot;IL1RL1&quot;     &quot;NOTCH3&quot;     &quot;CNTN3&quot;      &quot;PCMT1&quot;     
## [183] &quot;TREH&quot;       &quot;MAN1C1&quot;     &quot;EFEMP1&quot;     &quot;ARPC4&quot;      &quot;APOD&quot;       &quot;HLA.DRA&quot;    &quot;CD48&quot;      
## [190] &quot;ADAMTS2&quot;    &quot;RECK&quot;       &quot;LPL&quot;        &quot;STIP1&quot;      &quot;CD300A&quot;     &quot;LAMA5&quot;      &quot;TXN&quot;       
## [197] &quot;GALNT10&quot;    &quot;GANAB&quot;      &quot;PRAP1&quot;      &quot;PODXL&quot;      &quot;PGLS&quot;       &quot;MERTK&quot;      &quot;SIGLEC14&quot;  
## [204] &quot;PCYOX1&quot;     &quot;QSOX1&quot;      &quot;PON1&quot;       &quot;SELE&quot;       &quot;PCDH12&quot;     &quot;MANBA&quot;      &quot;CP&quot;        
## [211] &quot;F12&quot;        &quot;MYLK&quot;       &quot;F5&quot;         &quot;ADA&quot;        &quot;LILRA6&quot;     &quot;TEK&quot;        &quot;TYRO3&quot;     
## [218] &quot;IFNAR2&quot;     &quot;EFEMP2&quot;     &quot;ATP1B1&quot;     &quot;PPIB&quot;       &quot;PSMB6&quot;      &quot;HSPA13&quot;     &quot;LOXL3&quot;     
## [225] &quot;LAMB2&quot;      &quot;DPP7&quot;       &quot;SERPINA10&quot;  &quot;ESAM&quot;       &quot;SERPINB1&quot;   &quot;LRRC25&quot;     &quot;B3GNT2&quot;    
## [232] &quot;ACAA2&quot;      &quot;HEG1&quot;       &quot;MMRN1&quot;      &quot;PF4&quot;        &quot;CST6&quot;       &quot;CLIC1&quot;      &quot;AGA&quot;       
## [239] &quot;F13A1&quot;      &quot;ICOSLG&quot;     &quot;UGP2&quot;       &quot;CSF2RA&quot;     &quot;NECTIN1&quot;    &quot;GNPTG&quot;      &quot;CFL2&quot;      
## [246] &quot;IGFBP7&quot;     &quot;CASC4&quot;      &quot;INHBA&quot;      &quot;PYCARD&quot;     &quot;PDGFRA&quot;     &quot;FBN1&quot;       &quot;GCLM&quot;      
## [253] &quot;NTRK2&quot;      &quot;F2&quot;         &quot;KYNU&quot;       &quot;VTN&quot;        &quot;IGF2&quot;       &quot;SERPINF1&quot;   &quot;FCGBP&quot;     
## [260] &quot;F13B&quot;       &quot;OLFM1&quot;      &quot;CPN2&quot;       &quot;LEP&quot;        &quot;CFP&quot;        &quot;HSPA4&quot;      &quot;IGFBP3&quot;    
## [267] &quot;PCDH18&quot;    
## 
## $Intsect$`DF_vs_HV:NAFLD_vs_HV`
## [1] &quot;EIF4H&quot; &quot;PDIA6&quot;
## 
## $Intsect$`DO_vs_HV:DF_vs_HV`
## [1] &quot;FTH1&quot;
## 
## $Intsect$`DO_vs_HV:NAFLD_vs_HV`
##  [1] &quot;HPD&quot;      &quot;FERMT3&quot;   &quot;ALDH2&quot;    &quot;GOT1&quot;     &quot;ALDH1A1&quot;  &quot;RIDA&quot;     &quot;AGXT&quot;     &quot;GRB2&quot;     &quot;PLEK&quot;    
## [10] &quot;FCAMR&quot;    &quot;ACTN1&quot;    &quot;ALCAM&quot;    &quot;ALDOB&quot;    &quot;MMP8&quot;     &quot;GP6&quot;      &quot;FGA&quot;      &quot;LCP2&quot;     &quot;DLD&quot;     
## [19] &quot;PCBP1&quot;    &quot;HMGCS1&quot;   &quot;HSPE1&quot;    &quot;GSR&quot;      &quot;SNX12&quot;    &quot;MYDGF&quot;    &quot;ITGB3&quot;    &quot;PARVB&quot;    &quot;TUBA4A&quot;  
## [28] &quot;TCN1&quot;     &quot;ACTN4&quot;    &quot;CDH2&quot;     &quot;IL6ST&quot;    &quot;ITGAL&quot;    &quot;GDA&quot;      &quot;TREML1&quot;   &quot;THBS1&quot;    &quot;GAS6&quot;    
## [37] &quot;GMFB&quot;     &quot;HPSE&quot;     &quot;PRDX5&quot;    &quot;ERBB2&quot;    &quot;CPM&quot;      &quot;IFNAR1&quot;   &quot;IDH1&quot;     &quot;CAMP&quot;     &quot;GMFG&quot;    
## [46] &quot;MTPN&quot;     &quot;GP1BA&quot;    &quot;LIMS1&quot;    &quot;LILRA2&quot;   &quot;HIBADH&quot;   &quot;SIRPA&quot;    &quot;UBE2L3&quot;   &quot;CFL1&quot;     &quot;PSAT1&quot;   
## [55] &quot;ACAT2&quot;    &quot;SH3BGRL&quot;  &quot;APLP2&quot;    &quot;PTGES3&quot;   &quot;GSTP1&quot;    &quot;CTSZ&quot;     &quot;ACO1&quot;     &quot;PRKAR1A&quot;  &quot;MMP9&quot;    
## [64] &quot;CALM2&quot;    &quot;WDR1&quot;     &quot;LRP11&quot;    &quot;ACAA1&quot;    &quot;SNX3&quot;     &quot;SELP&quot;     &quot;WBP2&quot;     &quot;DPYD&quot;     &quot;EGF&quot;     
## [73] &quot;FHL1&quot;     &quot;UPB1&quot;     &quot;PLBD2&quot;    &quot;EIF3J&quot;    &quot;HNRNPK&quot;   &quot;RAD23B&quot;   &quot;SERPING1&quot; &quot;UBE2I&quot;    &quot;DBI&quot;     
## [82] &quot;SNCA&quot;     &quot;SOD2&quot;     &quot;GAA&quot;      &quot;CORO1A&quot;   &quot;ST3GAL6&quot;  &quot;FOLR2&quot;    &quot;ADGRL2&quot;   &quot;CRYZ&quot;     &quot;LMAN2&quot;   
## [91] &quot;ARHGDIA&quot;  &quot;HEXB&quot;     &quot;SCARF1&quot;   &quot;ST14&quot;    
## 
## $Intsect$`DO_vs_HV:DF_vs_HV:NAFLD_vs_HV`
##  [1] &quot;VASP&quot;     &quot;FLNA&quot;     &quot;NEXN&quot;     &quot;MAPRE2&quot;   &quot;EHD3&quot;     &quot;CTTN&quot;     &quot;DBNL&quot;     &quot;TWF2&quot;     &quot;PDLIM5&quot;  
## [10] &quot;CAVIN2&quot;   &quot;TUBB1&quot;    &quot;RAB11B&quot;   &quot;CALD1&quot;    &quot;TPM4&quot;     &quot;ZYX&quot;      &quot;SNAP23&quot;   &quot;CAP1&quot;     &quot;LASP1&quot;   
## [19] &quot;EEF1G&quot;    &quot;MYL12B&quot;   &quot;SH3BGRL3&quot; &quot;ABI1&quot;     &quot;PDLIM1&quot;   &quot;PFN1&quot;     &quot;BIN2&quot;     &quot;CRKL&quot;     &quot;MAPRE1&quot;  
## [28] &quot;CORO1C&quot;   &quot;SH3BGRL2&quot; &quot;TAGLN2&quot;   &quot;SKAP2&quot;    &quot;MAPRE3&quot;   &quot;LY6G6F&quot;   &quot;DIAPH1&quot;   &quot;PDLIM7&quot;   &quot;VAPA&quot;    
## [37] &quot;TPM1&quot;     &quot;VNN1&quot;     &quot;MYL6&quot;     &quot;LGALSL&quot;   &quot;CSRP1&quot;    &quot;MYH9&quot;     &quot;TMSB10&quot;   &quot;ARHGDIB&quot;  &quot;CNN2&quot;    
## [46] &quot;TLN1&quot;     &quot;COTL1&quot;    &quot;TPM3&quot;     &quot;TPT1&quot;     &quot;DBN1&quot;     &quot;FYB1&quot;     &quot;SPN&quot;      &quot;RGS10&quot;    &quot;TUBA1A&quot;  
## [55] &quot;TUBB4B&quot;   &quot;RAB14&quot;    &quot;ARHGAP18&quot; &quot;SLC9A3R1&quot; &quot;WDR44&quot;    &quot;TMOD3&quot;    &quot;ITGA2B&quot;   &quot;ARF3&quot;     &quot;CNTFR&quot;   
## [64] &quot;HSPB1&quot;    &quot;CTSW&quot;    
## 
## 
## $Names
## [1] &quot;DF_vs_HV:NAFLD_vs_HV&quot;          &quot;DO_vs_HV:DF_vs_HV&quot;             &quot;DO_vs_HV:NAFLD_vs_HV&quot;         
## [4] &quot;DO_vs_HV:DF_vs_HV:NAFLD_vs_HV&quot;</code></pre>
</div>
<div id="heatmap-of-top-hits" class="section level3">
<h3>Heatmap of top hits</h3>
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb19"><pre class="sourceCode r"><code class="sourceCode r"><span id="cb19-1"><a href="#cb19-1" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">DEphe</span>(dili_hotgenes,</span>
<span id="cb19-2"><a href="#cb19-2" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="at">contrasts  =</span> <span class="st">&quot;DO_vs_HV&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb19-3"><a href="#cb19-3" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="at">Topn       =</span> <span class="dv">5</span>,</span>
<span id="cb19-4"><a href="#cb19-4" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="at">cellheight =</span> <span class="dv">10</span>,</span>
<span id="cb19-5"><a href="#cb19-5" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="at">cellwidth  =</span> <span class="dv">8</span>,</span>
<span id="cb19-6"><a href="#cb19-6" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="at">annotation_colors =</span> <span class="fu">coldata_palettes</span>(dili_hotgenes),</span>
<span id="cb19-7"><a href="#cb19-7" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="at">annotations =</span> <span class="fu">c</span>(<span class="st">&quot;Condition&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;Pool&quot;</span>))</span></code></pre></div>
<p><img role="img" src="data:image/png;base64," /><!-- --></p>
</div>
<div id="expression-plots" class="section level3">
<h3>Expression plots</h3>
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb20"><pre class="sourceCode r"><code class="sourceCode r"><span id="cb20-1"><a href="#cb20-1" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">ExpsPlot</span>(dili_hotgenes,</span>
<span id="cb20-2"><a href="#cb20-2" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">xVar    =</span> <span class="st">&quot;Condition&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb20-3"><a href="#cb20-3" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">yVar    =</span> <span class="fu">c</span>(<span class="st">&quot;APOB&quot;</span>, <span class="st">&quot;ALB&quot;</span>),</span>
<span id="cb20-4"><a href="#cb20-4" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">fill    =</span> <span class="st">&quot;Condition&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb20-5"><a href="#cb20-5" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">boxplot =</span> <span class="cn">TRUE</span></span>
<span id="cb20-6"><a href="#cb20-6" tabindex="-1"></a>)</span></code></pre></div>
<p><img role="img" src="data:image/png;base64," /><!-- --></p>
</div>
<div id="gsea-with-kegg-pathways" class="section level3">
<h3>GSEA with KEGG pathways</h3>
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb21"><pre class="sourceCode r"><code class="sourceCode r"><span id="cb21-1"><a href="#cb21-1" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># Get KEGG gene sets</span></span>
<span id="cb21-2"><a href="#cb21-2" tabindex="-1"></a>H_paths <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> <span class="fu">msigdbr_wrapper</span>(</span>
<span id="cb21-3"><a href="#cb21-3" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">species  =</span> <span class="st">&quot;human&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-4"><a href="#cb21-4" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">set      =</span> <span class="st">&quot;CP:KEGG_MEDICUS&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-5"><a href="#cb21-5" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">gene_col =</span> <span class="st">&quot;gene_symbol&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb21-6"><a href="#cb21-6" tabindex="-1"></a>)</span>
<span id="cb21-7"><a href="#cb21-7" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-8"><a href="#cb21-8" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># Rank genes for the DO_vs_HV contrast</span></span>
<span id="cb21-9"><a href="#cb21-9" tabindex="-1"></a>InputRanks <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> dili_hotgenes <span class="sc">|&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb21-10"><a href="#cb21-10" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">DE</span>(</span>
<span id="cb21-11"><a href="#cb21-11" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">Report    =</span> <span class="st">&quot;Ranks&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-12"><a href="#cb21-12" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">contrasts =</span> <span class="st">&quot;DO_vs_HV&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-13"><a href="#cb21-13" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">Rank_name =</span> <span class="st">&quot;Gene&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-14"><a href="#cb21-14" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">padj_cut  =</span> <span class="fl">0.1</span></span>
<span id="cb21-15"><a href="#cb21-15" tabindex="-1"></a>  )</span>
<span id="cb21-16"><a href="#cb21-16" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-17"><a href="#cb21-17" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># Run fgsea</span></span>
<span id="cb21-18"><a href="#cb21-18" tabindex="-1"></a>Out_GSEA <span class="ot">&lt;-</span> <span class="fu">fgsea_</span>(</span>
<span id="cb21-19"><a href="#cb21-19" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">Ranks    =</span> InputRanks,</span>
<span id="cb21-20"><a href="#cb21-20" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">pathways =</span> H_paths,</span>
<span id="cb21-21"><a href="#cb21-21" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">nproc    =</span> <span class="dv">1</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-22"><a href="#cb21-22" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">minSize  =</span> <span class="dv">5</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-23"><a href="#cb21-23" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="at">maxSize  =</span> <span class="cn">Inf</span></span>
<span id="cb21-24"><a href="#cb21-24" tabindex="-1"></a>)</span>
<span id="cb21-25"><a href="#cb21-25" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">##   |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                  |   0%  |                                                                                                          |=================================================                                                 |  50%  |                                                                                                          |==================================================================================================| 100%</span></span>
<span id="cb21-26"><a href="#cb21-26" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-27"><a href="#cb21-27" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co"># Summarise significant pathways</span></span>
<span id="cb21-28"><a href="#cb21-28" tabindex="-1"></a>Out_GSEA <span class="sc">|&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb21-29"><a href="#cb21-29" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">fgsea_Results</span>(</span>
<span id="cb21-30"><a href="#cb21-30" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">contrasts =</span> <span class="st">&quot;DO_vs_HV&quot;</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-31"><a href="#cb21-31" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">padj_cut  =</span> <span class="fl">0.2</span>,</span>
<span id="cb21-32"><a href="#cb21-32" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="at">mode      =</span> <span class="st">&quot;D&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb21-33"><a href="#cb21-33" tabindex="-1"></a>  )</span>
<span id="cb21-34"><a href="#cb21-34" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## $DO_vs_HV</span></span>
<span id="cb21-35"><a href="#cb21-35" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## # A tibble: 4 × 9</span></span>
<span id="cb21-36"><a href="#cb21-36" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">##   pathway                                        pval   padj log2err     ES   NES  size leadingEdge sign_NES</span></span>
<span id="cb21-37"><a href="#cb21-37" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">##   &lt;chr&gt;                                         &lt;dbl&gt;  &lt;dbl&gt;   &lt;dbl&gt;  &lt;dbl&gt; &lt;dbl&gt; &lt;int&gt; &lt;list&gt;         &lt;dbl&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb21-38"><a href="#cb21-38" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## 1 kegg_medicus_variant_mutation_caused_aberra… 0.167  0.167    0.138 -0.539 -1.29     5 &lt;chr [4]&gt;         -1</span></span>
<span id="cb21-39"><a href="#cb21-39" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## 2 kegg_medicus_reference_itga_b_talin_vinculi… 0.0455 0.0607   0.277 -0.647 -1.54     5 &lt;chr [5]&gt;         -1</span></span>
<span id="cb21-40"><a href="#cb21-40" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## 3 kegg_medicus_reference_promotion_of_microtu… 0.0271 0.0543   0.352 -0.657 -1.57     5 &lt;chr [5]&gt;         -1</span></span>
<span id="cb21-41"><a href="#cb21-41" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="do">## 4 kegg_medicus_reference_microtubule_depolyme… 0.0121 0.0483   0.381 -0.660 -1.70     6 &lt;chr [6]&gt;         -1</span></span></code></pre></div>
</div>
<div id="interactive-exploration-with-shiny" class="section level3">
<h3>Interactive exploration with Shiny</h3>
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb22"><pre class="sourceCode r"><code class="sourceCode r"><span id="cb22-1"><a href="#cb22-1" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">Shiny_Hotgenes</span>(dili_hotgenes)</span></code></pre></div>
</div>
</div>

    document.getElementsByTagName("head")[0].appendChild(script);
  })();
</script>

</body>
</html>
